title: FAQ 3 - Negotiate Payment Plan with CRA
ocr_text:

Eastern Time

Question #2
Am I personally liable for my corporation's payroll debt?
• Does the CRA use Director's Liability provisions to come after me personally?
• If so, what's the process and timeline before they can enforce it?

Question #3
Can I negotiate a payment plan with the CRA?
• What documentation do I need to provide?
• Will they suspend collections while a payment plan is under review?
